title: OpenAPI Link Object
description: Represents a possible design-time link for a response, allowing transitions between operations.

operationRef.description: A relative or absolute URI reference to an OAS operation.

operationId.description: The name of an existing resolvable OAS operation.

parameters.description: A map representing parameters to pass to the linked operation.

requestBody.description: A literal value or runtime expression to use as a request body for the linked operation.
